item.title: Glovary Firewall Mini PC Quad Core N100 DDR5 8GB RAM 128GB NVMe SSD 6 x 2.5GbE i226V LAN Fanless Computer Hardware Micro Router Appliance AES-NI OPNsense TypeC Port TF Card Slot
item.description: Está Glovary Firewall Mini PC Quad Core N100 DDR5 8GB RAM 128GB NVMe SSD 6 x 2.5GbE i226V LAN Fanless Computer Hardware Micro Router Appliance AES-NI OPNsense TypeC Port TF Card Slot en el siguiente enlace! ℹ️: Package Contents – 1 xGLOVARY firewall appliance, 1 xPower adapter, 1 xSATA 3.0 cable, 1 x4pin fan cable, 1 xVESA bracket. Rich interfaces: 6 x2.5G i226V-LAN, 2 xHD, 1 xType-C, 1 xUSB3.2, 4 xUSB2.
